content: Vite + vite-plugin-pwa GitHub Pages deployment: set base: '/repo-name/' in vite.config.ts. The plugin automatically sets start_url and scope from base. Known issue: manifest icon src paths do NOT auto-prepend base — must write icon src as '/repo-name/icons/icon-192.png' explicitly in the VitePWA manifest config, not just 'icons/icon-192.png'. The sw.js and manifest.webmanifest are emitted to the root of the output dir and served from /repo-name/sw.js. Use scope: '/repo-name/' in the manifest explicitly to be safe.
